name: C2xConfigureChannel
title: C2xConfigureChannel
syntax: long C2xConfigureChannel(long appChannel, long radioChannel, long txPower, long maxTxPower, long layout, long dataRate, long bandWidth, long txAntenna, long rxAntenna)
description: This method allows to redefine some or all channel parameters on the fly, i.e. for all following activities on a specific VN4610 channel those new settings will be used.
In fact the method overwrites the corresponding internal configuration settings provided by the setup-dialog.

parameters.name: appChannel
parameters.description: Channel to apply settings to (1 .. n), n = available hardware channels (1=Ath1, 2=Ath2,…)”

return: 0 or error code according to the following.
